/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/ar qc libgdal_ogr_dgn_frmt.a CMakeFiles/gdal_ogr_dgn_frmt.dir/gdal/ogr/ogrsf_frmts/dgn/dgnhelp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gdal_ogr_dgn_frmt.dir/gdal/ogr/ogrsf_frmts/dgn/dgnopen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gdal_ogr_dgn_frmt.dir/gdal/ogr/ogrsf_frmts/dgn/dgnread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gdal_ogr_dgn_frmt.dir/gdal/ogr/ogrsf_frmts/dgn/dgnstroke.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gdal_ogr_dgn_frmt.dir/gdal/ogr/ogrsf_frmts/dgn/dgnwrite.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gdal_ogr_dgn_frmt.dir/gdal/ogr/ogrsf_frmts/dgn/ogrdgndatasource.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gdal_ogr_dgn_frmt.dir/gdal/ogr/ogrsf_frmts/dgn/ogrdgndriver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gdal_ogr_dgn_frmt.dir/gdal/ogr/ogrsf_frmts/dgn/ogrdgnlayer.cpp.o
